description: Quality gate v2 — fitness threshold tightened based on seam-local refinement baseline (12 captures, all refinement=True)

block.description: Robot transmission blocked — any one condition triggers BLOCK

warning.description: Warning raised but transmission allowed — operator review recommended

changes_from_v1: WARNING fitness: added 0.55 (refinement baseline lower bound)
WARNING RMSE: added 1.5mm (between cluster A 0.96mm and cluster B 1.57mm)
Pre-refinement captures (fitness 0.86-0.96) excluded from normal range
